merriment-social.topReviewSentiment: mostly positive — strong event/private dining praise, minor pricing concern (3% surcharge mention)

third-coast.topReviewSentiment: mixed — strong food praise but one 2-star review citing inattentive bar service to solo diner and overly salty dishes

flourchild.topReviewSentiment: mostly positive — King Cheese pizza, crab rangoon spring rolls, and Pink Pony drink praised; one 2-star calling crust dry/stale

loon-room.topReviewSentiment: very positive — cocktail creativity and bartender skill consistently praised; minor V-Day event feedback on charcuterie quality

existing_negative_reviews.author: Korinne Mack
existing_negative_reviews.summary: Ignored as solo diner at bar for 45 min, potholes dish too salty, shrimp cocktail unremarkable

existing_negative_reviews.author: Jim Whitaker
existing_negative_reviews.summary: Pizza crust dry/stale, sauce lacked flavor, compared to old Pizza Hut. Praised atmosphere, cleanliness, service, crab spring rolls
